mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, sku, category, brand, points_price, market_price, stock, sold_count, status, description, image_url, subtitle, delivery_method, service_guarantee, promotion, colors, specs, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version FROM product WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND category = #{category}
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, name, sku, category, brand, points_price, market_price, stock, sold_count, status, description, image_url, subtitle, delivery_method, service_guarantee, promotion, colors, specs, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version FROM product WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND category = #{category}
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET stock = stock - #{quantity}, sold_count = sold_count + #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE product SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, sold_count = GREATEST(sold_count - #{quantity}, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
